header.title: Review request
header.subtitle: Check the details below before continuing to the quote.

reason.title: Why this needs review
reason.what_to_do: What to do: confirm what to check, update anything that affects price, then continue to the quote.

status_help.manual_check: This request was held for a manual check before a quote can be sent.
status_help.processing_failed: Automatic processing did not finish. Review the details and photos, then continue when ready.
status_help.default: Review the request and decide on the next step.

codes.needs_review: Automatic processing needs a quick check before the quote can be sent safely.
codes.review_required: Automatic processing needs a quick check before the quote can be sent safely.
codes.missing_wall_rate: A wall rate is not set in your configuration. Add a rate or adjust the quote manually.
codes.missing_photos: Some details are missing - photos are needed for a reliable quote.
codes.missing_photo: Some details are missing - photos are needed for a reliable quote.
codes.low_confidence: The estimate was not confident enough to finish automatically.
codes.vision_low_confidence: The photos need a quick check before the numbers can be trusted.
codes.insufficient_context: Some details are missing - there was not enough information to finish automatically.
codes.quote_generation_failed: The quote could not be generated automatically; a quick review should fix it.
codes.estimate_generation_failed: The quote could not be generated automatically; a quick review should fix it.
codes.upload_failed: An upload did not finish, so the file set may be incomplete.
codes.repair_work_required: The photos suggest repair work may be involved.
codes.substrate_visible: The substrate is visible in the photos - confirm prep scope.
codes.surface_damage_detected: Surface damage appears in the photos - confirm scope.
codes.surface_preparation_required: Surface preparation may be needed - confirm before quoting.

fallbacks.missing_photo: The photos need a quick check (or more photos are needed).
fallbacks.missing_rate: A price setting is missing in configuration, so automatic calculation could not finish.
fallbacks.failed: A step in automatic processing did not finish - review and adjust if needed.
fallbacks.confidence: Confidence was too low to publish automatically.
